method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm after gating capability.pdf on both results/data/capability.json and a strict capability provenance manifest. Verified pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the appendix pages containing the external-result, interval-backed trajectory, 3D-trajectory, and held-out separation figures. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
